fields.In-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent facility: $125; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: $50
fields.Out-of-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent facility: $125; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: Not Covered
fields.In-Network Outpatient Surgery: Facility fee: Independent facility: $750; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Physician/surgeon fees: $60
fields.In-Network Inpatient Surgery: Day 1 - 3: $750 copay/day per admission after deductible; Day 4 and after: No Charge
fields.In-Network Major Diagnostics: Diagnostic test: Independent facility: $125; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Imaging: Independent facility: $350; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible
fields.Deductible Explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay.
fields.In-Network RX: Value generic drugs (Tier 1): $25 / Generic drugs (Tier 2): $45 / Preferred brand drugs (Tier 3): $115 / Non-Preferred brand drugs (Tier 4): 50% coinsurance after deductible / Specialty drugs (Tier 5): 50% coinsurance after deductible
